title: SCHC codec: decompress buffer 256 changed to SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED without verifying constant value
description:
Several decompress functions changed from hardcoded 256-byte buffers to SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED constant. Need to verify that SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED >= 256 to avoid introducing buffer overflow. If the constant is smaller, this is a P0 security issue.

Files: rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs lines 538, 588, 644, 695

Requires: check value of lichen_core::constants::SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED
